about.title: Your friendly guide to the Spanish-speaking world
about.text: I'm a certified Spanish teacher who fell in love with the language and never looked back. For the past eight years I've helped students across the world go from nervous beginners to confident speakers — always with patience, warmth, and a lot of laughter.

localSearch.title: Private online Spanish lessons for learners worldwide
localSearch.text: Looking for online Spanish lessons, a private Spanish tutor, or Spanish classes explained in Persian? I teach students worldwide with clear support in English or Persian.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to say your first ¡hola!?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute trial lesson. No pressure, no commitment — just a friendly chat to plan your Spanish journey.

hero.title: Hi, I'm Mehrsa
hero.subtitle: Spanish teacher, lifelong language lover, and your biggest cheerleader on the road to fluency.

story.title: My story
paragraphs: My journey with Spanish began as a curious student who couldn't stop watching Spanish films without subtitles. That curiosity turned into a passion, and the passion turned into a career I adore.

After living and studying in Spain, I trained as a language teacher and have spent the last eight years guiding learners from absolute beginner to advanced. Because I speak English and Persian fluently, I can meet you exactly where you are — explaining tricky grammar in the language that clicks for you.
I believe learning a language should feel like a conversation with a friend, not a test. My lessons are relaxed, personal, and built entirely around you.

items.title: Comfort first
items.text: You learn fastest when you're relaxed. No judgement, no fear of mistakes — mistakes are how we grow.

items.title: Speak early, speak often
items.text: Grammar matters, but communication matters more. We start speaking from lesson one.

items.title: Real, useful Spanish
items.text: We focus on the language you'll actually use — travel, work, family, friends, life.

items.title: Your pace, your goals
items.text: No two students are alike. Your plan flexes to fit your time, level, and ambitions.

credentials.title: Qualifications & experience
items: ELE (Spanish as a Foreign Language) teaching certification

hero.title: Questions, answered
hero.subtitle: Everything you might want to know before your first lesson. Still curious? Just reach out.

items.q: I'm a total beginner — is that okay?
items.a: Absolutely! Most of my students start from zero. We'll go at a comfortable pace and I'll explain everything in English or Persian so you never feel lost.

items.q: Which languages can you teach in?
items.a: I teach Spanish through English or Persian — whichever you're most comfortable with. We can even mix both if that helps.
Yes. Lessons are taught online over video call, so you can learn from anywhere with a schedule that fits your life.
Standard lessons are 60 minutes, but I also offer 45 and 90-minute sessions. We'll find what suits your attention and schedule best.

items.q: Do you help with DELE or SIELE exams?
items.a: Yes! I offer dedicated exam preparation with mock tests, writing feedback, and proven strategies for every level.

items.q: How do I pay, and what's your cancellation policy?
items.a: Payment is usually per lesson or in packages. Lessons can be rescheduled with at least 24 hours' notice. We'll sort out the details during your free trial.

items.q: What if I need to take a break?
items.a: Life happens! Just let me know and we'll pause your lessons. Your progress and plan will be right here when you're ready to return.

hero.title: Let's start your Spanish journey
hero.subtitle: Book your free trial or just say hola. I usually reply within a day.
